spring.speaker: SPRING
pages: You drink from the silver spring.
Fully restored.
You wake by the spring, whole again.
The Vale is patient. So are you.

shrine_fury.speaker: SHRINE
pages: The shrine flares red.
The Rune of FURY is yours: raw power, at a steep cost.

shrine_thirst.speaker: SHRINE
pages: The shrine glows warm.
The Rune of THIRST is yours: your spells now drink life back.

shrine_echo.speaker: SHRINE
pages: The shrine rings twice.
The Rune of ECHO is yours: one casting, two strikes.

shrine_keen.speaker: SHRINE
pages: The shrine glints like a drawn edge.
The Rune of KEEN is yours: your spells seek the seam.

gate_sealed.speaker: GATE
pages: The seal holds fast. It hungers for three Grand Sigils.

teleporter.speaker: WAYSTONE
pages: The spent sigil hums, holding the way home.
It carries you back to Hearth.

shrine_used.speaker: SHRINE
pages: The shrine is quiet now. Its rune already burns in your grimoire.

help.speaker: HOW TO PLAY
pages: Tall grass hides battles. Battles give XP. Levels and shrines unlock new spell parts.
Open the Grimoire to craft a spell from an ELEMENT, a FORM and a RUNE, then inscribe it into one of your four slots.
Wisps, bolts and lances strike one foe; you pick which. Nova scours them all. Veil raises a shield around you.
Enemies have weaknesses, and some of their blows linger on you. Focus restores you and cleanses the oldest mark.
Signposts gossip. Springs and shrines heal you free, and you wake by the last one you touched.

gate_shed_sign.speaker: SIGN
pages: Old doors all over the Vale answer to plain spellcraft.
Name the element they fear, and cast it.

gate_briarfall_lore.speaker: LORE STONE
pages: Glass born in ember reads every resistance as an invitation.
